definitions: To subject a person or animal to anesthesia.
To euthanize an animal, typically for humane reasons.
To cause someone (often a child) to fall asleep.
To cause boredom or loss of consciousness.
examples: The vet put the dog to sleep.
I need to put the baby to sleep.
The surgeon put him to sleep for the operation.
pastTenses: put to sleep, put to sleep
